description: Use the N/redirect module to customize navigation within NetSuite by setting up a redirect URL that resolves to a NetSuite resource or external URL. You can redirect users to: URL, Suitelet, Record, Task link, Saved search, Unsaved search. Note: Suitelets, beforeLoad user events, and synchronous afterSubmit user events are supported. This module does not support beforeSubmit or asynchronous afterSubmit user events. This module is only supported when triggered from the UI. Backend contexts such as CSV Import and Scheduled Scripts are not supported.

methods.name: redirect
methods.description: Redirects to the URL of a Suitelet that is available externally (available without login).

params.name: options.url
params.description: The URL of a Suitelet that is available externally.

params.name: options.parameters
params.description: Contains additional URL parameters as key-value pairs.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The type of record.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the target record.

params.name: options.isEditMode
params.description: Determines whether to return a URL for the record in edit mode or view mode. Default is false (view mode).

params.name: options.parameters
params.description: Contains additional URL parameters as key-value pairs.

methods.name: toRecordTransform
methods.description: Redirects to a standard or custom transaction instance. Transforms a record to a standard or custom transaction instance.

params.name: options.fromType
params.description: The ID of the source record type.

params.name: options.fromId
params.description: The ID of the source record.

params.name: options.toType
params.description: The ID of the target record type.

params.name: options.parameters
params.description: Contains additional parameters as key-value pairs.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the saved search.

methods.name: toSavedSearchResult
methods.description: Redirects to a saved search result.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the saved search.

params.name: options.search
params.description: The search object to redirect to.

params.name: options.search
params.description: The search object to redirect to.

params.name: options.scriptId
params.description: The script ID for the Suitelet.

params.name: options.deploymentId
params.description: The deployment ID for the Suitelet.

params.name: options.isExternal
params.description: Indicates an external Suitelet URL. Default is false.

params.name: options.parameters
params.description: Contains additional URL parameters as key-value pairs.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The task link identifier.

params.name: options.parameters
params.description: Contains additional URL parameters as key-value pairs.
